title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 18 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/11/2021
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends，as low as 489.5, an decrease of 4.28% throughout the day; the quotation in the morning wasdecreased by 10yuan/mt over yesterday. as the disk continues to decline，part of the business quotation shipping mentality turn weak，some traders lowered their offer, and steel mills purchased on demand, today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general. PBF at Shandong port dealt 570yuan/mt, decreased 20-25 yuan/mt over yesterday.
